task_completion.description: Verify that the new emergency contact name was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Robert Will' is visible in the emergency contact name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new emergency contact phone number was entered.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the patient's profile view showing the updated emergency contact details (Robert Will, Spouse, 617-555-9876) in a read-only state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with web or desktop application forms, buttons, and menus, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual medical records system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a medical/EMR application, not a generic text editor or a mocked-up HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the correct patient's record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Frances Will' or PID '2' is clearly visible on the same screen where the emergency contact is being updated, ensuring no other patient's data was altered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Frances Will (PID: 2, DOB: 1966-09-05). Expected Emergency Contact: Robert Will. Expected Phone: 6175559876 (or formatted as (617) 555-9876). Expected Relationship: Spouse.
